name: Sang Vinh Nguyen
description: AI Solutions Engineer building practical intelligent systems across domains
quotes: "Make AI practical, reliable, and useful for real work."
bio1: I am shaping my career around developing AI solutions that can adapt to many fields, from knowledge management and internal copilots to workflow automation, analytics, and product intelligence.
bio2: My work combines AI engineering with full-stack delivery. I build with LangChain, RAG architectures, agent workflows, embeddings, vector databases, Python, ReactJS, NodeJS, and SQL/NoSQL systems to turn domain knowledge into usable software.
bio3: My goal is to help teams transform messy information and repeated processes into reliable AI-powered systems. I care about communication, evaluation, Agile teamwork, and building solutions that solve real problems rather than only demonstrating technology.
